test_cases.test_case: Successful login with valid credentials
steps: 1. Enter <valid email> in the Email/Username field
2. Enter <valid password> in the Password field
3. Click Sign In
test_cases.expected_result: Signed in successfully.

test_cases.test_case: Leave the Email field blank and submit
steps: 1. Leave the Email_Username field blank
2. Fill the Password field with a valid password
3. Click Sign In
test_cases.expected_result: Inline validation error appears on the Email_Username field indicating it is required

test_cases.test_case: Leave the Password field blank and submit
steps: 1. Fill the Email_Username field with a valid email
2. Leave the Password field blank
3. Click Sign In
test_cases.expected_result: Inline validation error appears on the Password field indicating it is required

test_cases.test_case: Submit with an invalid email format
steps: 1. Enter <invalid email format> in the Email_Username field
2. Fill the Password field with a valid password
3. Click Sign In
test_cases.expected_result: Inline validation error appears on the Email_Username field indicating it must be a valid email format

test_cases.test_case: Submit with a password that does not meet requirements
steps: 1. Fill the Email_Username field with a valid email
2. Enter <password shorter than 8 characters> in the Password field
3. Click Sign In
test_cases.expected_result: Inline validation error appears on the Password field indicating it must be at least 8 characters

test_cases.test_case: Submit with a password that lacks required complexity
steps: 1. Fill the Email_Username field with a valid email
2. Enter <password without uppercase, lowercase, number, and special character> in the Password field
3. Click Sign In
test_cases.expected_result: Inline validation error appears on the Password field indicating it must include uppercase, lowercase, number, and special character

test_cases.test_case: Submit with incorrect credentials
steps: 1. Fill the Email_Username field with a valid email
2. Enter <incorrect password> in the Password field
3. Click Sign In
test_cases.expected_result: Form does not submit; error shown: 'Incorrect email or password. Please try again.'; Password field is cleared

test_cases.test_case: Password meets minimum length requirement
steps: 1. Enter a valid email format in the Email/Username field
2. Enter a password with exactly 8 characters, including uppercase, lowercase, number, and special character
3. Click Sign In
test_cases.expected_result: Signed in successfully.

test_cases.test_case: Password fails minimum length requirement
steps: 1. Enter a valid email format in the Email/Username field
2. Enter a password with exactly 7 characters, including uppercase, lowercase, number, and special character
3. Click Sign In
test_cases.expected_result: Incorrect email or password. Please try again.

test_cases.test_case: Email field accepts maximum length string
steps: 1. Enter an email address that is at the maximum allowed length in the Email/Username field
2. Enter a valid password in the Password field
3. Click Sign In
test_cases.expected_result: Signed in successfully.

test_cases.test_case: Email field with special characters
steps: 1. Enter an email address with special characters in the Email/Username field
2. Enter a valid password in the Password field
3. Click Sign In
test_cases.expected_result: Signed in successfully.

test_cases.test_case: Password with leading and trailing whitespace
steps: 1. Enter a valid email format in the Email/Username field
2. Enter a password with leading and trailing spaces, but valid length and characters in the Password field
3. Click Sign In
test_cases.expected_result: Signed in successfully.

test_cases.test_case: Successful registration with valid inputs
steps: 1. Enter <First Name> in the First Name field
2. Enter <Last Name> in the Last Name field
3. Enter <Street Address> in the Street Address field
4. Enter <City> in the City field
5. Select <State> from the State dropdown
6. Enter <ZIP Code> in the ZIP Code field
7. Enter <Phone Number> in the Phone Number field
8. Enter <Social Security Number> in the Social Security Number field
9. Enter <valid email> in the Username field
10. Enter <Password> in the Password field
11. Enter <Password> in the Confirm Password field
12. Click the Register button
test_cases.expected_result: Account created successfully — please sign in

test_cases.test_case: Leave the First Name field blank and submit
steps: 1. Leave the First Name field blank
2. Fill all other required fields
3. Click Register
test_cases.expected_result: Inline validation error appears on the First_Name field indicating it is required

test_cases.test_case: Leave the Last Name field blank and submit
steps: 1. Leave the Last Name field blank
2. Fill all other required fields
3. Click Register
test_cases.expected_result: Inline validation error appears on the Last_Name field indicating it is required

test_cases.test_case: Leave the Street Address field blank and submit
steps: 1. Leave the Street Address field blank
2. Fill all other required fields
3. Click Register
test_cases.expected_result: Inline validation error appears on the Street_Address field indicating it is required

test_cases.test_case: Leave the City field blank and submit
steps: 1. Leave the City field blank
2. Fill all other required fields
3. Click Register
test_cases.expected_result: Inline validation error appears on the City field indicating it is required

test_cases.test_case: Leave the State field unselected and submit
steps: 1. Leave the State field unselected
2. Fill all other required fields
3. Click Register
test_cases.expected_result: Inline validation error appears on the State field indicating it is required

test_cases.test_case: Leave the ZIP Code field blank and submit
steps: 1. Leave the ZIP Code field blank
2. Fill all other required fields
3. Click Register
test_cases.expected_result: Inline validation error appears on the ZIP_Code field indicating it is required

test_cases.test_case: Enter an invalid format in the Phone Number field and submit
steps: 1. Enter <invalid phone number format> in the Phone_Number field
2. Fill all other required fields
3. Click Register
test_cases.expected_result: Inline validation error appears on the Phone_Number field indicating it must follow the format (123) 456-7890

test_cases.test_case: Enter an invalid format in the Social Security Number field and submit
steps: 1. Enter <invalid SSN format> in the Social_Security_Number field
2. Fill all other required fields
3. Click Register
test_cases.expected_result: Inline validation error appears on the Social_Security_Number field indicating it must follow the format 123-45-6789

test_cases.test_case: Enter an invalid email format in the Username field and submit
steps: 1. Enter <invalid email format> in the Username field
2. Fill all other required fields
3. Click Register
test_cases.expected_result: Inline validation error appears on the Username field indicating it must be a valid email format

test_cases.test_case: Enter a short password in the Password field and submit
steps: 1. Enter <password shorter than 8 characters> in the Password field
2. Fill all other required fields
3. Click Register
test_cases.expected_result: Inline validation error appears on the Password field indicating it must be at least 8 characters

test_cases.test_case: Enter mismatched passwords in Password and Confirm Password fields and submit
steps: 1. Enter <valid password> in the Password field
2. Enter <different password> in the Confirm_Password field
3. Fill all other required fields
4. Click Register
test_cases.expected_result: Inline validation error appears on the Confirm_Password field indicating 'Confirm Password must match Password'

test_cases.test_case: ZIP Code with exactly 5 digits
steps: 1. Enter a 5-digit number in the ZIP Code field
test_cases.expected_result: Form submits successfully; account is created with the provided ZIP Code

test_cases.test_case: ZIP Code with 5+4 format
steps: 1. Enter a ZIP Code in the 5+4 format (12345-6789) in the ZIP Code field
test_cases.expected_result: Form submits successfully; account is created with the provided ZIP Code

test_cases.test_case: Phone Number with valid format
steps: 1. Enter a phone number in the format (123) 456-7890 in the Phone Number field
test_cases.expected_result: Form submits successfully; account is created with the provided Phone Number

test_cases.test_case: Social Security Number with valid format
steps: 1. Enter a Social Security Number in the format 123-45-6789 in the Social Security Number field
test_cases.expected_result: Form submits successfully; account is created with the provided Social Security Number

test_cases.test_case: Password with exactly 8 characters
steps: 1. Enter a password with exactly 8 characters in the Password field
2. Enter the same password in the Confirm Password field
test_cases.expected_result: Form submits successfully; account is created with the provided Password

test_cases.test_case: Username with special characters
steps: 1. Enter a valid email with special characters in the Username field
test_cases.expected_result: Form submits successfully; account is created with the provided Username

test_cases.test_case: Leading/trailing whitespace in First Name
steps: 1. Enter '  John  ' in the First Name field
2. Fill all other required fields with valid data
3. Click Register
test_cases.expected_result: Leading/trailing whitespace is trimmed; saved value shown in detail page has 'John'

test_cases.test_case: View Account Number displays correct account number
steps: 1. Navigate to the Accounts Overview page
2. Click on the Account Number cell for an account
test_cases.expected_result: Account number displayed

test_cases.test_case: Attempt to view account number when action is not implemented
steps: 1. Click on the Account Number column
test_cases.expected_result: No action occurs; the account number is not displayed as the action is not implemented yet.

test_cases.test_case: Attempt to click on the Account Number link
preconditions: User is logged in and on the Accounts Overview page
steps: 1. Locate the Account Number column in the table
2. Click on the Account Number link
test_cases.expected_result: No action occurs; a message indicates the feature is not implemented yet.

test_cases.test_case: Check display of masked account numbers
preconditions: User is logged in and on the Accounts Overview page
steps: 1. Observe the Account Number column in the table
test_cases.expected_result: Account numbers are displayed masked, showing only the last 4 digits as ****5001.

test_cases.test_case: Open Checking Account with valid details
steps: 1. Select 'Checking' as the Account Type
2. Enter '25' in the Initial Deposit Amount field
3. Select a <valid funding source account> from the Funding Source Account dropdown
4. Click 'Open Account'
test_cases.expected_result: Account opened successfully!; redirects to accounts overview

test_cases.test_case: Open Savings Account with valid details
steps: 1. Select 'Savings' as the Account Type
2. Enter '100' in the Initial Deposit Amount field
3. Select a <valid funding source account> from the Funding Source Account dropdown
4. Click 'Open Account'
test_cases.expected_result: Account opened successfully!; redirects to accounts overview

test_cases.test_case: Leave Account Type blank and submit
steps: 1. Leave the Account Type field blank
2. Fill in the Initial Deposit Amount and Funding Source Account fields
3. Click Open Account
test_cases.expected_result: Inline validation error appears on the Account Type field indicating it is required

test_cases.test_case: Leave Initial Deposit Amount blank and submit
steps: 1. Leave the Initial Deposit Amount field blank
2. Select an Account Type and Funding Source Account
3. Click Open Account
test_cases.expected_result: Inline validation error appears on the Initial Deposit Amount field indicating it is required

test_cases.test_case: Enter non-numeric value in Initial Deposit Amount
steps: 1. Enter <non-numeric value> in the Initial Deposit Amount field
2. Select an Account Type and Funding Source Account
3. Click Open Account
test_cases.expected_result: Inline validation error appears on the Initial Deposit Amount field indicating it must be numeric

test_cases.test_case: Enter amount less than minimum for Checking and submit
steps: 1. Enter <amount below $25> in the Initial Deposit Amount field
2. Select Checking as Account Type and Funding Source Account
3. Click Open Account
test_cases.expected_result: Inline validation error appears on the Initial Deposit Amount field indicating it must be at least $25 for Checking

test_cases.test_case: Enter amount less than minimum for Savings and submit
steps: 1. Enter <amount below $100> in the Initial Deposit Amount field
2. Select Savings as Account Type and Funding Source Account
3. Click Open Account
test_cases.expected_result: Inline validation error appears on the Initial Deposit Amount field indicating it must be at least $100 for Savings

test_cases.test_case: Leave Funding Source Account blank and submit
steps: 1. Leave the Funding Source Account field blank
2. Select an Account Type and enter Initial Deposit Amount
3. Click Open Account
test_cases.expected_result: Inline validation error appears on the Funding Source Account field indicating it is required

test_cases.test_case: Select Funding Source Account with insufficient balance and submit
steps: 1. Select an Account Type
2. Enter <valid amount> in the Initial Deposit Amount field
3. Select a Funding Source Account with insufficient balance
4. Click Open Account
test_cases.expected_result: Inline validation error appears on the Funding Source Account field indicating it must have sufficient balance

test_cases.test_case: Attempt to open account with Checking type without meeting minimum deposit
steps: 1. Select Checking as Account Type
2. Enter <amount below $25> in the Initial Deposit Amount field
3. Select a Funding Source Account
4. Click Open Account
test_cases.expected_result: Form does not submit; error shown on Initial Deposit Amount field indicating it must be at least $25 for Checking

test_cases.test_case: Attempt to open account with Savings type without meeting minimum deposit
steps: 1. Select Savings as Account Type
2. Enter <amount below $100> in the Initial Deposit Amount field
3. Select a Funding Source Account
4. Click Open Account
test_cases.expected_result: Form does not submit; error shown on Initial Deposit Amount field indicating it must be at least $100 for Savings

test_cases.test_case: Minimum deposit for Checking account
preconditions: Account Type is set to Checking
steps: 1. Enter $25 in the Initial Deposit Amount field
2. Select a Funding Source Account with sufficient balance
3. Click Open Account
test_cases.expected_result: Account opened successfully!; user is redirected to accounts overview

test_cases.test_case: One unit below minimum deposit for Checking account
preconditions: Account Type is set to Checking
steps: 1. Enter $24 in the Initial Deposit Amount field
2. Select a Funding Source Account with sufficient balance
3. Click Open Account
test_cases.expected_result: Inline error shown indicating deposit must be at least $25

test_cases.test_case: Minimum deposit for Savings account
preconditions: Account Type is set to Savings
steps: 1. Enter $100 in the Initial Deposit Amount field
2. Select a Funding Source Account with sufficient balance
3. Click Open Account
test_cases.expected_result: Account opened successfully!; user is redirected to accounts overview

test_cases.test_case: One unit below minimum deposit for Savings account
preconditions: Account Type is set to Savings
steps: 1. Enter $99 in the Initial Deposit Amount field
2. Select a Funding Source Account with sufficient balance
3. Click Open Account
test_cases.expected_result: Inline error shown indicating deposit must be at least $100

test_cases.test_case: Transfer funds from My ParaBank Account
steps: 1. Select 'My ParaBank Account' as the Transfer Type
2. Enter <valid amount> in the Transfer Amount field
3. Select 'Checking' from the Source Account dropdown
4. Click Transfer
test_cases.expected_result: Transfer completed successfully.

test_cases.test_case: Transfer funds to an External Account
steps: 1. Select 'External Account' as the Transfer Type
2. Enter <valid amount> in the Transfer Amount field
3. Select 'Savings' from the Source Account dropdown
4. Click 'Add Destination' to enter an external account
5. Enter <valid external account number> in the External Account Number field
6. Click Transfer
test_cases.expected_result: Transfer completed successfully.

test_cases.test_case: Leave Transfer Amount blank and submit
steps: 1. Select 'My ParaBank Account' for Transfer Type
2. Leave the Transfer Amount field blank
3. Select a Source Account
4. Click Transfer
test_cases.expected_result: Inline validation error appears on the Transfer Amount field indicating it is required

test_cases.test_case: Enter invalid amount in Transfer Amount field
steps: 1. Select 'My ParaBank Account' for Transfer Type
2. Enter <invalid amount> in the Transfer Amount field
3. Select a Source Account
4. Click Transfer
test_cases.expected_result: Inline validation error appears on the Transfer Amount field indicating it must be a valid amount

test_cases.test_case: Select Source Account and leave External Account Number blank
steps: 1. Select 'External Account' for Transfer Type
2. Enter <valid amount> in the Transfer Amount field
3. Select a Source Account
4. Leave the External Account Number field blank
5. Click Transfer
test_cases.expected_result: Inline validation error appears on the External Account Number field indicating it must be a valid account number

test_cases.test_case: Enter invalid account number for External Account
steps: 1. Select 'External Account' for Transfer Type
2. Enter <valid amount> in the Transfer Amount field
3. Select a Source Account
4. Enter <invalid account number> in the External Account Number field
5. Click Transfer
test_cases.expected_result: Inline validation error appears on the External Account Number field indicating it must be a valid account number

test_cases.test_case: Attempt transfer without sufficient funds
steps: 1. Select 'My ParaBank Account' for Transfer Type
2. Enter <amount exceeding available balance> in the Transfer Amount field
3. Select a Source Account
4. Click Transfer
test_cases.expected_result: Error shown: 'Insufficient funds'

test_cases.test_case: Attempt transfer with mismatched account numbers for External Account
steps: 1. Select 'External Account' for Transfer Type
2. Enter <valid amount> in the Transfer Amount field
3. Select a Source Account
4. Enter <valid account number> in the External Account Number field
5. Enter <different valid account number> in the confirm field
6. Click Transfer
test_cases.expected_result: Error shown: 'Account numbers do not match'

test_cases.test_case: Transfer amount at minimum valid value
steps: 1. Select 'External Account' as the Transfer Type
2. Enter the minimum valid amount in the Transfer Amount field
3. Select a Source Account from the dropdown
4. Add an External Account Number in the repeating group
5. Click Transfer
test_cases.expected_result: Transfer completes successfully with a transaction ID.

test_cases.test_case: Transfer amount just below minimum valid value
steps: 1. Select 'External Account' as the Transfer Type
2. Enter an amount just below the minimum valid amount in the Transfer Amount field
3. Select a Source Account from the dropdown
4. Add an External Account Number in the repeating group
5. Click Transfer
test_cases.expected_result: Transfer is blocked; error shown indicating insufficient funds.

test_cases.test_case: Add maximum allowed entries to the repeating group
steps: 1. Select 'External Account' as the Transfer Type
2. Enter a valid amount in the Transfer Amount field
3. Select a Source Account from the dropdown
4. Add the maximum allowed External Account Numbers in the repeating group
5. Click Transfer
test_cases.expected_result: Transfer completes successfully with a transaction ID.

test_cases.test_case: Attempt to add one more entry to the repeating group
steps: 1. Select 'External Account' as the Transfer Type
2. Enter a valid amount in the Transfer Amount field
3. Select a Source Account from the dropdown
4. Add the maximum allowed External Account Numbers in the repeating group
5. Attempt to add one more External Account Number to the repeating group
test_cases.expected_result: Adding the entry is blocked; no additional entry is accepted.

test_cases.test_case: Enter an invalid account number format
steps: 1. Select 'External Account' as the Transfer Type
2. Enter a valid amount in the Transfer Amount field
3. Select a Source Account from the dropdown
4. Add an invalid External Account Number format in the repeating group
5. Click Transfer
test_cases.expected_result: Transfer is blocked; error shown indicating 'must be a valid account number'.

test_cases.test_case: Submit payment with valid details
steps: 1. Enter <valid payee name> in the Payee Name field
2. Enter <valid street address> in the Street Address field
3. Enter <valid city> in the City field
4. Enter <valid state> in the State field
5. Enter <valid ZIP code> in the ZIP Code field
6. Enter <valid phone number> in the Phone Number field
7. Enter <valid payee account number> in the Payee Account Number field
8. Enter <same payee account number> in the Confirm Account Number field
9. Enter <valid payment amount> in the Payment Amount field
10. Select <valid source account> from the Source Account dropdown
11. Click Pay
test_cases.expected_result: Payment submitted successfully with reference code

test_cases.test_case: Leave Payee Name blank and submit
steps: 1. Leave the Payee_Name field blank
2. Fill all other required fields
3. Click Pay
test_cases.expected_result: Inline validation error appears on the Payee_Name field indicating it is required

test_cases.test_case: Leave Street Address blank and submit
steps: 1. Leave the Street_Address field blank
2. Fill all other required fields
3. Click Pay
test_cases.expected_result: Inline validation error appears on the Street_Address field indicating it is required

test_cases.test_case: Leave City blank and submit
steps: 1. Leave the City field blank
2. Fill all other required fields
3. Click Pay
test_cases.expected_result: Inline validation error appears on the City field indicating it is required

test_cases.test_case: Leave State blank and submit
steps: 1. Leave the State field blank
2. Fill all other required fields
3. Click Pay
test_cases.expected_result: Inline validation error appears on the State field indicating it is required

test_cases.test_case: Leave ZIP Code blank and submit
steps: 1. Leave the ZIP_Code field blank
2. Fill all other required fields
3. Click Pay
test_cases.expected_result: Inline validation error appears on the ZIP_Code field indicating it is required

test_cases.test_case: Leave Phone Number blank and submit
steps: 1. Leave the Phone_Number field blank
2. Fill all other required fields
3. Click Pay
test_cases.expected_result: Inline validation error appears on the Phone_Number field indicating it is required

test_cases.test_case: Leave Payee Account Number blank and submit
steps: 1. Leave the Payee_Account_Number field blank
2. Fill all other required fields
3. Click Pay
test_cases.expected_result: Inline validation error appears on the Payee_Account_Number field indicating it is required

test_cases.test_case: Leave Confirm Account Number blank and submit
steps: 1. Leave the Confirm_Account_Number field blank
2. Fill all other required fields
3. Click Pay
test_cases.expected_result: Inline validation error appears on the Confirm_Account_Number field indicating it is required

test_cases.test_case: Leave Payment Amount blank and submit
steps: 1. Leave the Payment_Amount field blank
2. Fill all other required fields
3. Click Pay
test_cases.expected_result: Inline validation error appears on the Payment_Amount field indicating it is required

test_cases.test_case: Leave Source Account blank and submit
steps: 1. Leave the Source_Account field blank
2. Fill all other required fields
3. Click Pay
test_cases.expected_result: Inline validation error appears on the Source_Account field indicating it is required

test_cases.test_case: Submit payment with account number mismatch
steps: 1. Fill Payee_Account_Number with <valid account number>
2. Fill Confirm_Account_Number with <different account number>
3. Fill all other required fields
4. Click Pay
test_cases.expected_result: Inline validation error appears indicating 'Account numbers do not match'

test_cases.test_case: Submit payment with insufficient funds
steps: 1. Fill Payment_Amount with <amount exceeding available balance>
2. Fill all other required fields
3. Click Pay
test_cases.expected_result: Inline validation error appears indicating 'Insufficient funds'

test_cases.test_case: Payment Amount at minimum value
steps: 1. Enter a valid Payee Name in the Payee_Name field
2. Enter a valid Street Address in the Street_Address field
3. Enter a valid City in the City field
4. Enter a valid State in the State field
5. Enter a valid ZIP Code in the ZIP_Code field
6. Enter a valid Phone Number in the Phone_Number field
7. Enter a valid Payee Account Number in the Payee_Account_Number field
8. Enter the same Payee Account Number in the Confirm_Account_Number field
9. Enter the minimum allowed Payment Amount in the Payment_Amount field
10. Select a valid Source Account from the dropdown
11. Click Pay
test_cases.expected_result: Payment submitted successfully with reference code

test_cases.test_case: Payment Amount just below minimum value
steps: 1. Enter a valid Payee Name in the Payee_Name field
2. Enter a valid Street Address in the Street_Address field
3. Enter a valid City in the City field
4. Enter a valid State in the State field
5. Enter a valid ZIP Code in the ZIP_Code field
6. Enter a valid Phone Number in the Phone_Number field
7. Enter a valid Payee Account Number in the Payee_Account_Number field
8. Enter the same Payee Account Number in the Confirm_Account_Number field
9. Enter an amount just below the minimum allowed in the Payment_Amount field
10. Select a valid Source Account from the dropdown
11. Click Pay
test_cases.expected_result: Payment is blocked; inline error shows 'Payment amount is below the minimum allowed'

test_cases.test_case: Confirm Account Number does not match Payee Account Number
steps: 1. Enter a valid Payee Name in the Payee_Name field
2. Enter a valid Street Address in the Street_Address field
3. Enter a valid City in the City field
4. Enter a valid State in the State field
5. Enter a valid ZIP Code in the ZIP_Code field
6. Enter a valid Phone Number in the Phone_Number field
7. Enter a valid Payee Account Number in the Payee_Account_Number field
8. Enter a different value in the Confirm_Account_Number field
9. Enter a valid Payment Amount in the Payment_Amount field
10. Select a valid Source Account from the dropdown
11. Click Pay
test_cases.expected_result: Payment is blocked; inline error shows 'Account numbers do not match'

test_cases.test_case: Payment Amount exceeds available balance
steps: 1. Enter a valid Payee Name in the Payee_Name field
2. Enter a valid Street Address in the Street_Address field
3. Enter a valid City in the City field
4. Enter a valid State in the State field
5. Enter a valid ZIP Code in the ZIP_Code field
6. Enter a valid Phone Number in the Phone_Number field
7. Enter a valid Payee Account Number in the Payee_Account_Number field
8. Enter the same Payee Account Number in the Confirm_Account_Number field
9. Enter a Payment Amount that exceeds available funds in the Payment_Amount field
10. Select a valid Source Account from the dropdown
11. Click Pay
test_cases.expected_result: Payment is blocked; inline error shows 'Insufficient funds'

test_cases.test_case: Submit Loan Application for Personal Loan
steps: 1. Select 'Personal' from the Loan Type cards
2. Enter <valid amount within $1,000-$50,000> in the Loan Amount field
3. Enter <valid down payment amount (minimum 10% of Loan Amount)> in the Down Payment Amount field
4. Select a valid Collateral Account from the dropdown
5. Click Submit Loan Application
test_cases.expected_result: Loan approved and created successfully!

test_cases.test_case: Submit Loan Application for Auto Loan
steps: 1. Select 'Auto' from the Loan Type cards
2. Enter <valid amount within $5,000-$75,000> in the Loan Amount field
3. Enter <valid down payment amount (minimum 10% of Loan Amount)> in the Down Payment Amount field
4. Select a valid Collateral Account from the dropdown
5. Click Submit Loan Application
test_cases.expected_result: Loan approved and created successfully!

test_cases.test_case: Submit Loan Application for Home Loan
steps: 1. Select 'Home' from the Loan Type cards
2. Enter <valid amount within $50,000-$500,000> in the Loan Amount field
3. Enter <valid down payment amount (minimum 10% of Loan Amount)> in the Down Payment Amount field
4. Select a valid Collateral Account from the dropdown
5. Click Submit Loan Application
test_cases.expected_result: Loan approved and created successfully!

test_cases.test_case: Leave Loan Amount blank and submit
steps: 1. Leave the Loan Amount field blank
2. Fill all other required fields
3. Click Submit Loan Application
test_cases.expected_result: Inline validation error appears on the Loan Amount field indicating it is required

test_cases.test_case: Leave Down Payment Amount blank and submit
steps: 1. Leave the Down Payment Amount field blank
2. Fill all other required fields
3. Click Submit Loan Application
test_cases.expected_result: Inline validation error appears on the Down Payment Amount field indicating it is required

test_cases.test_case: Enter Down Payment Amount greater than Loan Amount
steps: 1. Enter <amount greater than Loan Amount> in the Loan Amount field
2. Enter <amount greater than Loan Amount> in the Down Payment Amount field
3. Click Submit Loan Application
test_cases.expected_result: Form does not submit; error shown on Down Payment Amount field indicating it must be less than Loan Amount

test_cases.test_case: Enter Down Payment Amount less than 10% of Loan Amount
steps: 1. Enter <Loan Amount> in the Loan Amount field
2. Enter <amount less than 10% of Loan Amount> in the Down Payment Amount field
3. Click Submit Loan Application
test_cases.expected_result: Form does not submit; error shown on Down Payment Amount field indicating it must be at least 10% of Loan Amount

test_cases.test_case: Enter insufficient collateral value
steps: 1. Select <Collateral Account> from the dropdown
2. Enter <amount less than 20% of collateral value> in the Collateral Account field
3. Click Submit Loan Application
test_cases.expected_result: Form does not submit; error shown indicating insufficient collateral funds

test_cases.test_case: Submit Loan Application without sufficient collateral
steps: 1. Select a Loan Type
2. Enter <Loan Amount> in the Loan Amount field
3. Enter <Down Payment Amount> in the Down Payment Amount field
4. Select <Collateral Account> from the dropdown
5. Click Submit Loan Application
test_cases.expected_result: Form does not submit; error shown indicating inadequate collateral value

test_cases.test_case: Submit Loan Application for Personal Loan with invalid Loan Amount
steps: 1. Select Personal as Loan Type
2. Enter <amount less than $1,000> in the Loan Amount field
3. Enter <Down Payment Amount> in the Down Payment Amount field
4. Select <Collateral Account> from the dropdown
5. Click Submit Loan Application
test_cases.expected_result: Form does not submit; error shown on Loan Amount field indicating it must be between $1,000 and $50,000

test_cases.test_case: Submit Loan Application for Auto Loan with invalid Loan Amount
steps: 1. Select Auto as Loan Type
2. Enter <amount less than $5,000> in the Loan Amount field
3. Enter <Down Payment Amount> in the Down Payment Amount field
4. Select <Collateral Account> from the dropdown
5. Click Submit Loan Application
test_cases.expected_result: Form does not submit; error shown on Loan Amount field indicating it must be between $5,000 and $75,000

test_cases.test_case: Submit Loan Application for Home Loan with invalid Loan Amount
steps: 1. Select Home as Loan Type
2. Enter <amount less than $50,000> in the Loan Amount field
3. Enter <Down Payment Amount> in the Down Payment Amount field
4. Select <Collateral Account> from the dropdown
5. Click Submit Loan Application
test_cases.expected_result: Form does not submit; error shown on Loan Amount field indicating it must be between $50,000 and $500,000

test_cases.test_case: Test minimum Loan Amount for Personal Loan
steps: 1. Enter $1,000 in the Loan Amount field
2. Enter $100 in the Down Payment Amount field
3. Click Submit Loan Application
test_cases.expected_result: Loan approved and created successfully!

test_cases.test_case: Test maximum Loan Amount for Personal Loan
steps: 1. Enter $50,000 in the Loan Amount field
2. Enter $5,000 in the Down Payment Amount field
3. Click Submit Loan Application
test_cases.expected_result: Loan approved and created successfully!

test_cases.test_case: Test Down Payment Amount less than minimum required for Personal Loan
preconditions: Enter $10,000 in the Loan Amount field
steps: 1. Enter $900 in the Down Payment Amount field
2. Click Submit Loan Application
test_cases.expected_result: Down Payment Amount must be at least 10% of Loan Amount.

test_cases.test_case: Test maximum Loan Amount for Auto Loan
steps: 1. Enter $75,000 in the Loan Amount field
2. Enter $7,500 in the Down Payment Amount field
3. Click Submit Loan Application
test_cases.expected_result: Loan approved and created successfully!

test_cases.test_case: Test maximum Loan Amount for Home Loan
steps: 1. Enter $500,000 in the Loan Amount field
2. Enter $50,000 in the Down Payment Amount field
3. Click Submit Loan Application
test_cases.expected_result: Loan approved and created successfully!

test_cases.test_case: Test Down Payment Amount exceeds Loan Amount for Home Loan
preconditions: Enter $100,000 in the Loan Amount field
steps: 1. Enter $110,000 in the Down Payment Amount field
2. Click Submit Loan Application
test_cases.expected_result: Down Payment Amount must be less than Loan Amount.

test_cases.test_case: Test long text in Loan Amount field
steps: 1. Enter a string of 200+ characters in the Loan Amount field
2. Click Submit Loan Application
test_cases.expected_result: Loan Amount field displays an error indicating invalid input.

test_cases.test_case: Test special characters in Loan Amount field
steps: 1. Enter special characters in the Loan Amount field
2. Click Submit Loan Application
test_cases.expected_result: Loan Amount field displays an error indicating invalid input.

test_cases.test_case: Submit updated contact information
preconditions: Profile form is pre-filled with existing contact information
steps: 1. Enter <valid first name> in the First Name field
2. Enter <valid last name> in the Last Name field
3. Enter <valid street address> in the Street Address field
4. Enter <valid city> in the City field
5. Select <valid state> from the State dropdown
6. Enter <valid ZIP code> in the ZIP Code field
7. Enter <valid phone number> in the Phone Number field
8. Click Update Profile
test_cases.expected_result: A success notification is displayed; the message 'Profile updated successfully.' is shown.

test_cases.test_case: Leave First Name blank and submit
steps: 1. Leave the First_Name field blank
2. Fill all other required fields
3. Click Update Profile
test_cases.expected_result: Inline validation error appears on the First_Name field indicating it is required

test_cases.test_case: Leave Last Name blank and submit
steps: 1. Leave the Last_Name field blank
2. Fill all other required fields
3. Click Update Profile
test_cases.expected_result: Inline validation error appears on the Last_Name field indicating it is required

test_cases.test_case: Leave Street Address blank and submit
steps: 1. Leave the Street_Address field blank
2. Fill all other required fields
3. Click Update Profile
test_cases.expected_result: Inline validation error appears on the Street_Address field indicating it is required

test_cases.test_case: Leave City blank and submit
steps: 1. Leave the City field blank
2. Fill all other required fields
3. Click Update Profile
test_cases.expected_result: Inline validation error appears on the City field indicating it is required

test_cases.test_case: Leave State blank and submit
steps: 1. Leave the State field blank
2. Fill all other required fields
3. Click Update Profile
test_cases.expected_result: Inline validation error appears on the State field indicating it is required

test_cases.test_case: Leave ZIP Code blank and submit
steps: 1. Leave the ZIP_Code field blank
2. Fill all other required fields
3. Click Update Profile
test_cases.expected_result: Inline validation error appears on the ZIP_Code field indicating it is required

test_cases.test_case: Leave Phone Number blank and submit
steps: 1. Leave the Phone_Number field blank
2. Fill all other required fields
3. Click Update Profile
test_cases.expected_result: Inline validation error appears on the Phone_Number field indicating it is required

test_cases.test_case: Submit with all required fields empty
steps: 1. Leave all required fields blank
2. Click Update Profile
test_cases.expected_result: Inline validation error appears on the First_Name, Last_Name, Street_Address, City, State, ZIP_Code, and Phone_Number fields indicating they are required

test_cases.test_case: Enter maximum length string in First Name field
steps: 1. Enter a very long string (200+ characters) in the First Name field
2. Fill all other required fields with valid data
3. Click Update Profile
test_cases.expected_result: Profile updated successfully.

test_cases.test_case: Enter special characters in Phone Number field
steps: 1. Enter special characters in the Phone Number field
2. Fill all other required fields with valid data
3. Click Update Profile
test_cases.expected_result: Highlights invalid fields and displays an inline error banner.

test_cases.test_case: Enter leading/trailing whitespace in Last Name field
steps: 1. Enter '   Doe   ' in the Last Name field
2. Fill all other required fields with valid data
3. Click Update Profile
test_cases.expected_result: Leading/trailing whitespace is trimmed; saved value shown on the detail page has no extra spaces.

test_cases.test_case: Submit a card request with valid details
preconditions: account must be in good standing
steps: 1. Select 'Debit' from the Card Type dropdown
2. Enter <valid account> in the Account to Link field
3. Enter <complete shipping address> in the Shipping Address field
4. Click 'Request Card'
test_cases.expected_result: Card request submitted successfully.

test_cases.test_case: Update card controls with valid details
steps: 1. Select <existing card> from the Select Existing Card dropdown
2. Enter <valid numeric limit> in the New Spending Limit field
3. Click 'Add Date' in the Travel Notice section
4. Enter <valid date range> in the Date field
5. Enter <valid destination> in the Destination field
6. Select 'Active' from the Card Status dropdown
7. Click 'Update Controls'
test_cases.expected_result: Card controls updated successfully.

test_cases.test_case: Leave the Account to Link field blank and submit
steps: 1. Leave the Account to Link field blank
2. Fill all other required fields
3. Click Request Card
test_cases.expected_result: Inline validation error appears on the Account to Link field indicating it is required

test_cases.test_case: Leave the Shipping Address field incomplete and submit
steps: 1. Fill the Account to Link field
2. Leave the Shipping Address field incomplete
3. Click Request Card
test_cases.expected_result: Inline validation error appears on the Shipping Address field indicating 'address must be complete'

test_cases.test_case: Leave the Select Existing Card field blank and submit
steps: 1. Leave the Select Existing Card field blank
2. Fill all other required fields
3. Click Update Controls
test_cases.expected_result: Inline validation error appears on the Select Existing Card field indicating it is required

test_cases.test_case: Enter a non-numeric value in the New Spending Limit field
steps: 1. Fill the Select Existing Card field
2. Enter <non-numeric value> in the New Spending Limit field
3. Click Update Controls
test_cases.expected_result: Inline validation error appears on the New Spending Limit field indicating 'must be a valid numeric limit'

test_cases.test_case: Enter an invalid date range in the Travel Notice
steps: 1. Fill the Select Existing Card field
2. Fill the New Spending Limit field
3. Enter <invalid date range> in the Travel Notice Date field
4. Fill the Destination field
5. Click Update Controls
test_cases.expected_result: Inline validation error appears on the Travel Notice Date field indicating 'must be a valid date range'

test_cases.test_case: Select an invalid status transition in the Card Status field
steps: 1. Fill the Select Existing Card field
2. Fill the New Spending Limit field
3. Fill the Travel Notice
4. Select <invalid status transition> in the Card Status field
5. Click Update Controls
test_cases.expected_result: Inline validation error appears on the Card Status field indicating 'must be a valid status transition'

test_cases.test_case: Attempt to request a card when the address is incomplete
steps: 1. Fill the Account to Link field
2. Leave the Shipping Address field incomplete
3. Click Request Card
test_cases.expected_result: Form does not submit; card request is not created; inline validation error appears on the Shipping Address field indicating 'address must be complete'

test_cases.test_case: Attempt to update controls without selecting an existing card
steps: 1. Leave the Select Existing Card field blank
2. Click Update Controls
test_cases.expected_result: Form does not submit; card controls are not updated; inline validation error appears on the Select Existing Card field indicating it is required

test_cases.test_case: Test complete address for card request
steps: 1. Select 'Debit' from the Card Type dropdown
2. Enter a complete address in the Shipping Address field
3. Fill in a valid account in the Account to Link field
4. Click 'Request Card'
test_cases.expected_result: Card request submitted successfully.

test_cases.test_case: Test incomplete address for card request
steps: 1. Select 'Credit' from the Card Type dropdown
2. Enter an incomplete address in the Shipping Address field
3. Fill in a valid account in the Account to Link field
4. Click 'Request Card'
test_cases.expected_result: Form displays an error indicating the address must be complete.

test_cases.test_case: Test valid numeric limit for spending limit
steps: 1. Select an existing card from the Select Existing Card dropdown
2. Enter a valid numeric limit in the New Spending Limit field
3. Click 'Update Controls'
test_cases.expected_result: Card controls updated successfully.

test_cases.test_case: Test invalid numeric limit for spending limit
steps: 1. Select an existing card from the Select Existing Card dropdown
2. Enter an invalid numeric limit in the New Spending Limit field (e.g., negative number)
3. Click 'Update Controls'
test_cases.expected_result: Inline error appears indicating the limit is invalid.

test_cases.test_case: Test valid date range for travel notice
steps: 1. Select an existing card from the Select Existing Card dropdown
2. Add a travel notice with a valid date range in the Travel Notice section
3. Click 'Update Controls'
test_cases.expected_result: Card controls updated successfully.

test_cases.test_case: Test invalid date range for travel notice
steps: 1. Select an existing card from the Select Existing Card dropdown
2. Add a travel notice with an invalid date range (start date after end date) in the Travel Notice section
3. Click 'Update Controls'
test_cases.expected_result: Inline error appears indicating the date range is invalid.

test_cases.test_case: Test valid status transition for card status
steps: 1. Select an existing card from the Select Existing Card dropdown
2. Change the Card Status to 'Frozen'
3. Click 'Update Controls'
test_cases.expected_result: Card controls updated successfully.

test_cases.test_case: Test invalid status transition for card status
steps: 1. Select an existing card from the Select Existing Card dropdown
2. Change the Card Status to an invalid transition (if applicable, e.g., from 'Frozen' back to 'Active' without meeting conditions)
3. Click 'Update Controls'
test_cases.expected_result: Inline error appears indicating the status transition is invalid.

test_cases.test_case: Execute a trade successfully
steps: 1. Select 'Buy' from the Action dropdown
2. Enter <valid fund symbol> in the Fund Symbol field
3. Enter <valid quantity greater than zero> in the Quantity field
4. Select <valid funding account> from the Funding or Destination Account dropdown
5. Click Execute Trade
test_cases.expected_result: Trade executed successfully. with order ID

test_cases.test_case: Create a recurring investment plan successfully
preconditions: User has adequate balance in the funding account
steps: 1. Enter <valid fund symbol> in the Fund Symbol field
2. Enter <valid contribution amount meeting minimum> in the Contribution Amount field
3. Select 'Weekly' from the Frequency dropdown
4. Enter <valid future date> in the Start Date field
5. Select <valid funding account> from the Funding Account dropdown
6. Click Create Plan
test_cases.expected_result: Plan created successfully.

test_cases.test_case: Leave the Fund Symbol blank and submit
steps: 1. Leave the Fund Symbol field blank
2. Fill in the Quantity with a valid number
3. Select a valid Action
4. Select a valid Funding or Destination Account
5. Click Execute Trade
test_cases.expected_result: Inline validation error appears on the Fund Symbol field indicating it is required

test_cases.test_case: Enter a non-existent Fund Symbol and submit
steps: 1. Enter <non-existent fund symbol> in the Fund Symbol field
2. Fill in the Quantity with a valid number
3. Select a valid Action
4. Select a valid Funding or Destination Account
5. Click Execute Trade
test_cases.expected_result: Inline validation error appears on the Fund Symbol field indicating 'symbol must exist'

test_cases.test_case: Enter zero quantity and submit
steps: 1. Enter <0> in the Quantity field
2. Fill in the Fund Symbol with a valid symbol
3. Select a valid Action
4. Select a valid Funding or Destination Account
5. Click Execute Trade
test_cases.expected_result: Inline validation error appears on the Quantity field indicating 'must be greater than zero'

test_cases.test_case: Select a Funding or Destination Account without sufficient balance and submit
steps: 1. Fill in the Fund Symbol with a valid symbol
2. Fill in the Quantity with a valid number
3. Select a valid Action
4. Select a Funding or Destination Account with insufficient balance
5. Click Execute Trade
test_cases.expected_result: Inline validation error appears on the Funding or Destination Account field indicating 'must have sufficient buying power or share balance'

test_cases.test_case: Leave the Contribution Amount blank and submit
steps: 1. Leave the Contribution Amount field blank
2. Fill in the Fund Symbol with a valid symbol
3. Select a Frequency
4. Enter a valid Start Date
5. Select a valid Funding Account
6. Click Create Plan
test_cases.expected_result: Inline validation error appears on the Contribution Amount field indicating it is required

test_cases.test_case: Enter a Contribution Amount below minimum and submit
steps: 1. Enter <amount below minimum> in the Contribution Amount field
2. Fill in the Fund Symbol with a valid symbol
3. Select a Frequency
4. Enter a valid Start Date
5. Select a valid Funding Account
6. Click Create Plan
test_cases.expected_result: Inline validation error appears on the Contribution Amount field indicating 'must meet minimum contribution'

test_cases.test_case: Enter a Start Date in the past and submit
steps: 1. Enter <past date> in the Start Date field
2. Fill in the Fund Symbol with a valid symbol
3. Select a Frequency
4. Enter a valid Contribution Amount
5. Select a valid Funding Account
6. Click Create Plan
test_cases.expected_result: Inline validation error appears on the Start Date field indicating 'must be in the future'

test_cases.test_case: Select a Funding Account without adequate balance and submit
steps: 1. Fill in the Fund Symbol with a valid symbol
2. Fill in the Contribution Amount with a valid number
3. Select a Frequency
4. Enter a valid Start Date
5. Select a Funding Account with inadequate balance
6. Click Create Plan
test_cases.expected_result: Inline validation error appears on the Funding Account field indicating 'must have adequate balance'

test_cases.test_case: Quantity is exactly 1
steps: 1. Select 'Buy' from the Action dropdown
2. Enter '1' in the Quantity field
3. Select a valid Fund Symbol
4. Select a Funding or Destination Account
5. Click Execute Trade
test_cases.expected_result: Trade executes successfully; order ID is displayed.

test_cases.test_case: Quantity is 0
steps: 1. Select 'Buy' from the Action dropdown
2. Enter '0' in the Quantity field
3. Select a valid Fund Symbol
4. Select a Funding or Destination Account
5. Click Execute Trade
test_cases.expected_result: Inline error shown: 'Quantity must be greater than zero'.

test_cases.test_case: Start Date is today
steps: 1. Enter a valid Fund Symbol
2. Enter a valid Contribution Amount
3. Select 'Weekly' from the Frequency dropdown
4. Enter today's date in the Start Date field
5. Select a Funding Account
6. Click Create Plan
test_cases.expected_result: Inline error shown: 'Start date must be in the future'.

test_cases.test_case: Start Date is in the future
steps: 1. Enter a valid Fund Symbol
2. Enter a valid Contribution Amount
3. Select 'Weekly' from the Frequency dropdown
4. Enter a date that is one day in the future in the Start Date field
5. Select a Funding Account
6. Click Create Plan
test_cases.expected_result: Plan created successfully; schedule is stored.

test_cases.test_case: Enter long Fund Symbol
steps: 1. Enter a Fund Symbol that exceeds the typical length (e.g., 50 characters)
2. Observe the input behavior
test_cases.expected_result: Field accepts input or shows an error indicating the length limit.

test_cases.test_case: Enter special characters in Contribution Amount
steps: 1. Enter special characters (e.g., '@#$%') in the Contribution Amount field
2. Observe the input behavior
test_cases.expected_result: Inline error shown indicating invalid input.

test_cases.test_case: Generate account statement successfully
steps: 1. Select a valid <Statement Period> from the date options
2. Select a valid <Account> from the dropdown
3. Click 'Generate Statement'
test_cases.expected_result: Statement generated successfully.

test_cases.test_case: Save e-Statement preference successfully
steps: 1. Check the 'Opt into Paperless' checkbox
2. Enter a valid <Email Address> in the Email Address field
3. Click 'Save Preference'
test_cases.expected_result: e-Statement preference updated.

test_cases.test_case: Attempt to generate statement with blank Statement Period
steps: 1. Leave the Statement Period field blank
2. Select an Account from the dropdown
3. Click Generate Statement
test_cases.expected_result: Form does not submit; Statement Period field is highlighted with an error indicating it is required

test_cases.test_case: Attempt to generate statement with invalid dates
steps: 1. Enter <invalid date format> in the Statement Period field
2. Select an Account from the dropdown
3. Click Generate Statement
test_cases.expected_result: Form does not submit; error shown indicating dates must be valid

test_cases.test_case: Attempt to save e-statement preference with blank Email Address
steps: 1. Leave the Email Address field blank
2. Check the Opt into Paperless checkbox
3. Click Save Preference
test_cases.expected_result: Form does not submit; Email Address field is highlighted with an error indicating it is required

test_cases.test_case: Attempt to save e-statement preference with invalid email format
steps: 1. Enter <invalid email format> in the Email Address field
2. Check the Opt into Paperless checkbox
3. Click Save Preference
test_cases.expected_result: Form does not submit; Email Address field displays an error: 'Must be a valid email address'

test_cases.test_case: Generate statement with invalid date range
steps: 1. Enter an invalid date range in the Statement Period field
2. Select an account from the dropdown
3. Click Generate Statement
test_cases.expected_result: Unable to generate statement — please try again later.

test_cases.test_case: Save preference with invalid email address
steps: 1. Enter an invalid email address in the Email_Address field
2. Check the Opt_into_Paperless checkbox
3. Click Save Preference
test_cases.expected_result: Email_Address field is highlighted with guidance.

test_cases.test_case: Enter long email address
steps: 1. Enter a very long email address (over 254 characters) in the Email_Address field
2. Click Save Preference
test_cases.expected_result: Email_Address field is highlighted with guidance.

test_cases.test_case: Enter email address with special characters
steps: 1. Enter an email address with special characters (e.g., 'user!#$%&'*+/=?^_`{|}~@example.com') in the Email_Address field
2. Click Save Preference
test_cases.expected_result: Email_Address field is highlighted with guidance.

test_cases.test_case: Change Password with valid credentials
steps: 1. Enter <valid current password> in the Current Password field
2. Enter <valid new password> in the New Password field
3. Enter <same valid new password> in the Confirm New Password field
4. Click Change Password
test_cases.expected_result: Password changed successfully.

test_cases.test_case: Leave Current Password blank and submit
steps: 1. Leave the Current Password field blank
2. Fill New Password and Confirm New Password with valid values
3. Click Change Password
test_cases.expected_result: Inline validation error appears on the Current Password field indicating it is required

test_cases.test_case: Leave New Password blank and submit
steps: 1. Fill Current Password with valid value
2. Leave the New Password field blank
3. Fill Confirm New Password with valid value
4. Click Change Password
test_cases.expected_result: Inline validation error appears on the New Password field indicating it is required

test_cases.test_case: Leave Confirm New Password blank and submit
steps: 1. Fill Current Password with valid value
2. Fill New Password with valid value
3. Leave the Confirm New Password field blank
4. Click Change Password
test_cases.expected_result: Inline validation error appears on the Confirm New Password field indicating it is required

test_cases.test_case: Enter Current Password incorrectly and submit
steps: 1. Enter <incorrect current password> in the Current Password field
2. Fill New Password and Confirm New Password with valid values
3. Click Change Password
test_cases.expected_result: Inline validation error appears indicating 'must verify current password'

test_cases.test_case: Enter New Password that does not meet strong-password policy
steps: 1. Fill Current Password with valid value
2. Enter <weak password> in the New Password field
3. Fill Confirm New Password with the same <weak password>
4. Click Change Password
test_cases.expected_result: Inline validation error appears on the New Password field indicating 'must meet strong-password policy'

test_cases.test_case: Enter mismatched New Password and Confirm New Password
steps: 1. Fill Current Password with valid value
2. Fill New Password with valid value
3. Fill Confirm New Password with a different value
4. Click Change Password
test_cases.expected_result: Inline validation error appears on the Confirm New Password field indicating 'must match New Password'

test_cases.test_case: Enter a valid Current Password that matches the existing password
steps: 1. Enter the valid Current Password in the Current Password field
2. Enter a New Password that meets the strong-password policy in the New Password field
3. Enter the same New Password in the Confirm New Password field
4. Click Change Password
test_cases.expected_result: Password changed successfully.

test_cases.test_case: Enter a New Password that is just below the strong-password policy requirements
steps: 1. Enter the valid Current Password in the Current Password field
2. Enter a New Password that does not meet the strong-password policy in the New Password field
3. Enter the same New Password in the Confirm New Password field
4. Click Change Password
test_cases.expected_result: Validation error highlights the New Password field indicating it must meet strong-password policy.

test_cases.test_case: Enter a Confirm New Password that does not match the New Password
steps: 1. Enter the valid Current Password in the Current Password field
2. Enter a valid New Password in the New Password field
3. Enter a different password in the Confirm New Password field
4. Click Change Password
test_cases.expected_result: Validation error highlights the Confirm New Password field indicating it must match New Password.

test_cases.test_case: Send a secure message successfully
steps: 1. Enter <valid subject> in the Subject field
2. Select 'Technical' from the Category dropdown
3. Enter <valid message body> in the Message Body field
4. Click 'Send Message'
test_cases.expected_result: Message sent successfully with ticket ID

test_cases.test_case: Request a callback successfully
steps: 1. Select <valid reason for call> from the Reason for Call dropdown
2. Enter <valid date> in the Preferred Date field
3. Enter <valid time window> in the Preferred Time Window field
4. Verify the Phone Number field is pre-filled
5. Click 'Request Callback'
test_cases.expected_result: Callback request submitted and email confirmation sent

test_cases.test_case: Leave the Message Body field blank and submit
steps: 1. Leave the Message Body field blank
2. Fill in Subject and Category with valid values
3. Click Send Message
test_cases.expected_result: Inline validation error appears on the Message Body field indicating it is required

test_cases.test_case: Leave the Preferred Date field blank and submit
steps: 1. Leave the Preferred Date field blank
2. Fill in Reason for Call and Phone Number with valid values
3. Click Request Callback
test_cases.expected_result: Inline validation error appears on the Preferred Date field indicating it is required

test_cases.test_case: Submit the secure message form with an invalid subject length
steps: 1. Enter <invalid subject length> in the Subject field
2. Fill in Message Body with valid content
3. Click Send Message
test_cases.expected_result: Inline validation error appears on the Subject field indicating 'subject length must be valid'

test_cases.test_case: Submit the schedule callback form with an invalid phone number format
steps: 1. Enter <invalid phone number format> in the Phone Number field
2. Fill in Reason for Call and Preferred Date with valid values
3. Click Request Callback
test_cases.expected_result: Inline validation error appears on the Phone Number field indicating 'phone number format must be valid'

test_cases.test_case: Submit the schedule callback form with a Preferred Date that is not the next business day
steps: 1. Enter <date not next business day> in the Preferred Date field
2. Fill in Reason for Call and Phone Number with valid values
3. Click Request Callback
test_cases.expected_result: Inline validation error appears on the Preferred Date field indicating 'date must be at least the next business day'

test_cases.test_case: Submit the secure message form with an invalid attachment type
steps: 1. Attach a file with an invalid type in the Attachment field
2. Fill in Subject and Message Body with valid values
3. Click Send Message
test_cases.expected_result: Inline validation error appears on the Attachment field indicating 'attachment types must be valid'

test_cases.test_case: Test preferred date as the next business day
preconditions: User is on the Schedule Callback Form
steps: 1. Select a date that is the next business day in the Preferred_Date field
2. Fill in all other required fields
3. Click Request Callback
test_cases.expected_result: Callback request submitted and email confirmation sent

test_cases.test_case: Test preferred date as one day before the next business day
preconditions: User is on the Schedule Callback Form
steps: 1. Select a date that is one day before the next business day in the Preferred_Date field
2. Fill in all other required fields
3. Click Request Callback
test_cases.expected_result: Inline error shown indicating the date must be at least the next business day

test_cases.test_case: Test subject length at the minimum valid length
preconditions: User is on the Secure Message Form
steps: 1. Enter the minimum valid length subject in the Subject field
2. Select a category from the dropdown
3. Enter a message body in the Message_Body field
4. Click Send Message
test_cases.expected_result: Message sent successfully with ticket ID

test_cases.test_case: Test subject length below the minimum valid length
preconditions: User is on the Secure Message Form
steps: 1. Enter a subject that is below the minimum valid length in the Subject field
2. Select a category from the dropdown
3. Enter a message body in the Message_Body field
4. Click Send Message
test_cases.expected_result: Inline error shown indicating the subject length must be valid

test_cases.test_case: Test message body with a very long text
preconditions: User is on the Secure Message Form
steps: 1. Enter a very long text (200+ characters) in the Message_Body field
2. Enter a valid subject in the Subject field
3. Select a category from the dropdown
4. Click Send Message
test_cases.expected_result: Message sent successfully with ticket ID or inline error shown indicating message body must be present

test_cases.test_case: Test phone number with invalid format
preconditions: User is on the Schedule Callback Form
steps: 1. Enter an invalid phone number format in the Phone_Number field
2. Select a reason for the call from the dropdown
3. Select a valid preferred date
4. Click Request Callback
test_cases.expected_result: Inline error shown indicating phone number format must be valid
